# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

Prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

cors:
  name: cors
  config:
    origins: "https://example.com, https://anotherdomain.com"
    methods: "GET, POST, OPTIONS"
    headers: "Content-Type, Authorization"
    exposed_headers: "X-Custom-Header"
    credentials: true
    max_age: 3600

key-auth:
  name: key-auth
  config:
    key_names: ["apikey"]
    hide_credentials: true

rate-limiting:
  name: rate-limiting
  config:
    second: 5
    minute: 100
    hour: 1000
    day: 10000
    month: 50000
    policy: "local"

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config: *cors.config
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"
    protocols: ["http", "https"]
    tags: ["global", "security"]

  - name: key-auth
    config: *key-auth.config
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"
    protocols: ["http", "https"]
    tags: ["global", "security"]

  - name: rate-limiting
    config: *rate-limiting.config
    enabled: true
    run_on: "first"
    protocols: ["http", "https"]
    tags: ["global", "security"]

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: "http://example-service"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config: *cors.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["service", "security"]

      - name: key-auth
        config: *key-auth.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["service", "security"]

      - name: rate-limiting
        config: *rate-limiting.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["service", "security"]

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths: ["/example"]
    service: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config: *cors.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["route", "security"]

      - name: key-auth
        config: *key-auth.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["route", "security"]

      - name: rate-limiting
        config: *rate-limiting.config
        enabled: true
        run_on: "first"
        protocols: ["http", "https"]
        tags: ["route", "security"]
